interpretation: Each admissible model must fit the calibration observations within this aggregate standardized residual threshold
No calibration observation may exceed this absolute standardized residual
Every listed independent validation constraint must pass for a model class to be admissible
BIC is n*ln(RSS/n)+k*ln(n) using standardized calibration residuals and fitted parameter count k
A passing four-conformation model has an acceptable complexity penalty when its BIC is no more than 10 above the best adequately fitted three-conformation model
At least one independent validation constraint must fail for every adequately fitted three-conformation model
